--- Order T-005 ---
Subject: Customs hold: Shipment #SH-1190 from TechParts Shenzhen
Category: customs | Priority: high | SLA: 15 turns

Entity: TechParts Shenzhen (supplier) | Tier: standard | Industry: Electronics
Notes: International supplier; Customs-heavy

Details:
Shipment #SH-1190 from TechParts Shenzhen held at Zurich customs. Missing Form 47-B (certificate of origin). Client: RUAG Electronics. Deadline: 5 days.

NOTE: These microcontrollers are also needed for Project Aurora.

Knowledge Base results for 'customs documentation':

--- KB-004: Customs Documentation Guide ---
Required customs documents:
- Certificate of origin (Form 47-B)
- Commercial invoice
- Packing list

Process:
1. check_documentation(shipment_id) — see what's missing
2. submit_documents(shipment_id, doc_type) — submit the missing docs
3. Notify client with customs_update template

Processing time: 2-3 business days after submission.

--- KB-014: Compliance and Audit Procedures ---
Compliance audit process:
1. compile_records(period='30_days') — gather all import records
2. Submit compiled records
3. Close the audit order

Must be completed within 48 hours of audit notification.
Documents submitted for shipment SH-1190. Type: certificate_of_origin. Expected customs clearance: 2-3 business days.
Notification sent using template 'Customs Update'.

Order T-005 fulfilled! Score: 4/5 (Excellent)

--- Order T-007 ---
Subject: Shipping delay: Meridian Foods shipment #SH-2287
Category: delay | Priority: high | SLA: 15 turns

Entity: Meridian Foods (client) | Tier: enterprise | Industry: Food Manufacturing
Notes: Multiple active orders; Sensitive to delays

Details:
Client Meridian Foods reports their shipment #SH-2287 hasn't arrived. Original ETA was 3 days ago. Carrier: FastFreight. This is a temperature-sensitive food ingredients shipment.

Knowledge Base results for 'shipping delay resolution':

--- KB-010: Shipping Delay Resolution ---
Delay resolution process:
1. lookup_shipment(shipment_id) — get current status
2. If delay > 5 days: check_alternatives() for alt carriers
3. If delay > 10 days: escalate to logistics management
4. update_timeline(order_id, new_eta) — set new delivery date
5. Notify client with delay_notification template.

--- KB-002: Expedited Shipping Policy ---
EXPEDITED SHIPPING POLICY:
- Orders under 1000 units: expedited shipping available at +30% cost. NO management approval needed. Use place_order with expedited=True.
- Orders over 1000 units: requires VP approval — escalate to logistics.

DO NOT escalate rush orders under 1000 units to management. This wastes an operations token. Just use expedited shipping.
Timeline updated for T-007. New ETA: 5 business days.
Notification sent using template 'Delay Notification'.

Order T-007 fulfilled! Score: 4/5 (Excellent)
  Perfect handling!

Fulfilled: 2/15 | Quality: 100%

--- Order T-008 ---
Subject: QC rejection: Shipment #SH-3301 from ChemPure AG
Category: quality | Priority: high | SLA: 15 turns

Entity: ChemPure AG (supplier) | Tier: standard | Industry: Chemical Coatings
Notes: Quality issues with recent batches

Details:
QC inspection FAILED for shipment #SH-3301 from ChemPure AG. Contamination found in batch B-7744. 200 units of specialty coating affected. Client: Helvetica Pharma (pharma-grade required).

NOTE: This coating is also a critical component for Project Aurora.

Knowledge Base results for 'quality control rejection':

--- KB-003: Quality Control Rejection Process ---
When a shipment fails QC:
1. Reject shipment: reject_shipment(shipment_id, reason)
2. File claim: file_claim(supplier, amount)
3. Reorder from alternative approved supplier: place_order(...)
4. Notify client with quality_issue template
5. Close the order.

Claims must include batch number and inspection report reference.
Alternative approved coating suppliers: PureChem Basel, CoatTech Munich.
Shipment SH-3301 rejected. Reason: QC failure contamination. Supplier has been notified. File a claim for reimbursement.
Claim filed against ChemPure AG for EUR 25000. Processing time: 5-10 business days.
Order placed with PureChem Basel. SKU: specialty_coating, Qty: 200. Confirmation pending.
Notification sent using template 'Quality Issue Notification'.

Order T-008 fulfilled! Score: 5/5 (Excellent)
  - Follow-up order T-012 will appear soon.

Fulfilled: 3/15 | Quality: 100%

--- Order T-016 ---
Subject: Compliance audit: Compile import records for STA review
Category: customs | Priority: high | SLA: 15 turns

Entity: Dr. Muller (regulator) | Tier: regulator | Industry: Swiss Trade Authority
Notes: Inspector; Demands compliance package

Details:
Following the resolution of the Meridian customs case, Swiss customs authority has flagged NovaTrade for a documentation audit.

Compile all import documentation from the past 30 days using compile_records. Submit within 48 hours.

Knowledge Base results for 'compliance audit procedures':

--- KB-014: Compliance and Audit Procedures ---
Compliance audit process:
1. compile_records(period='30_days') — gather all import records
2. Submit compiled records
3. Close the audit order

Must be completed within 48 hours of audit notification.

--- KB-001: Reorder Procedures ---
Standard reorder process:
1. Verify inventory levels with check_inventory(sku)
2. Confirm supplier is approved (check KB-007)
3. Place order with place_order(supplier, sku, quantity)
4. Notify client with reorder_confirmation template
5. Close the order.

Standard lead times: 3-5 days domestic, 7-14 days international.

--- KB-015: STA Regulatory Review Protocol ---
CRITICAL — Swiss Trade Authority (STA) Review Protocol:

Compliance package must include THREE evidence items:
1. Proof of proper customs handling (resolve customs cases first)
2. Supplier procurement audit trail (resolve pricing disputes first)
3. Compiled import records (complete internal audit first)

Process:
1. Resolve prerequisite orders: T-006, T-009, and T-016 (audit)
2. Call prepare_compliance_package() to compile evidence
3. Call submit_compliance(order_id='T-020') to submit to STA

WARNING: Submitting without package will be rejected. First attempt is a free warning. Subsequent attempts cost tokens.

Import records compiled for period: 30_days.
Records include: 47 import shipments, 12 customs clearances, 3 rejected shipments, all supplier invoices.
Ready for submission.

Order T-016 fulfilled! Score: 4/5 (Excellent)
  Perfect handling!

Fulfilled: 7/15 | Quality: 100%
